title: Projects
subtitle: Track mythforges and collaborate with your guild.
noProjects: No projects yet. Create one to get started.
onlyPinnedMatch: Only pinned projects match your filters.
accessRestrictedDescription: You don't have permission to view projects in this Mythforge. Contact an administrator if you believe this is an error.

myProjects.title: My Projects
myProjects.subtitle: Projects you have access to across all your guilds.
myProjects.empty: You're not part of any projects yet.

templates.noTemplatesDescription: Create a template from any project in project settings.
templates.description: Standardize best practices and quickly spin up new mythforges using reusable templates.

archived.title: Archived projects
archived.subtitle: Reopen an Mythforge when the work picks back up.
archived.noArchivedDescription: Active projects stay on the Active tab.
archived.noArchivedDescriptionAlt: Active projects stay on the main projects tab.

createDialog.title: Create project
createDialog.description: Give the project a name, optional description, and owning Mythforge.
createDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Share context to help the Mythforge prioritize.
createDialog.disableTemplateHint: Disable “Save as template” to pick a template.
createDialog.saveAsTemplateHint: Template projects live under the Templates tab and can be reused to spin up new work.
createDialog.selectinitiativeError: Select an Mythforge before creating a project

detail.notFoundDescription: This project may have been deleted or you may have followed a broken link.
detail.noAccessDescription: You don’t have permission to view this project. Ask a project manager to grant you access.

overview.templateInfo: This project is a template. Use it to create new projects from the Templates tab.
overview.archivedInfo: This project is archived. Unarchive it from settings to add or update tasks.

taskComposer.title: Create task
taskComposer.archivedMessage: This project is archived. Unarchive it to add new tasks.
taskComposer.noWriteAccess: You need write access to create tasks.
taskComposer.descriptionPlaceholder: Share context, links, or acceptance criteria.
taskComposer.assigneesEmptyMessage: Invite Mythforge {{memberLabel}} role holders to assign work.

assignee.emptyMessage: Invite Mythforge {{memberLabel}} role holders to assign tasks.

statuses.title: Task statuses
statuses.description: Reorder, rename, or change category for the task columns used by this project.
statuses.noManagePermission: Only project managers can modify task statuses. Contact a project manager if you need changes.
statuses.deleteDescription: Select a fallback status in the same category to move any existing tasks before deleting “{{name}}”.

settings.title: Project settings
settings.description: Configure access, ownership, and archival status for {{name}}.
settings.noPermission: You do not have permission to manage this project.

details.title: Project details
details.description: Update the icon, name, and description shown across the workspace.
details.identityDescription: Give the project a recognizable name and emoji.
details.iconHint: Pick an emoji to make this project easy to spot.
details.noWriteAccessIdentity: You need write access to change the project name or icon.
details.descriptionDescription: Share context to help collaborators understand the work.
details.descriptionPlaceholder: What are we trying to accomplish?
details.noWriteAccessDescription: You need write access to edit the description.
details.tagsDescription: Add tags to organize and filter projects.
details.noWriteAccessTags: You need write access to manage tags.

roleAccess.title: Role access
roleAccess.description: Grant access to all members with a specific Mythforge role.
roleAccess.noRoles: No roles have been granted access to this project yet.
roleAccess.allRolesAssigned: All Mythforge roles already have access to this project.

access.title: Individual access
access.description: Control who can view and edit this project.
access.allMembersHaveAccess: All Mythforge members already have access to this project.
access.grantAllError: Unable to grant access to all members
access.bulkUpdateError: Unable to update access for selected members
access.bulkRemoveError: Unable to remove access for selected members

templateStatus.title: Template status
templateStatus.description: Convert this project into a reusable template or revert it back to a standard project.
templateStatus.isTemplate: This project is currently a template and appears on the Templates page.
templateStatus.isStandard: This project behaves like a standard project.
templateStatus.noWriteAccess: You need write access to change template status.

duplicate.title: Duplicate project
duplicate.description: Clone this project, including its Mythforge and tasks, to jumpstart new work.
duplicate.noWriteAccess: You need write access to duplicate this project.

archiveStatus.title: Archive status
archiveStatus.noWriteAccess: You need write access to change archive status.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Deleting a project sends it and its tasks to the trash. They can be restored before the retention period ends.
danger.deleteDescription: The project and its tasks will be sent to the trash. You can restore them from Settings → Trash before the retention period ends.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Attach Mythforge documents to keep context close to project work.
documents.noDocuments: No documents attached to this project yet.
documents.noDocumentsHint: Attach one to highlight relevant briefs.
documents.attachDialogDescription: Only documents created under this Mythforge are available.
documents.allAttached: All Mythforge documents are already attached.
documents.attachHint: Need a new one? Open My mythforges and use the Mythforge's Documents tab to create it, then return here to attach it.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.enterTooltip: Hit ‘enter’ to create a new task
tasks.archiveDialogDescription: This will archive {{count}} task. Archived tasks are hidden by default but can be shown using the filter.
tasks.archiveDialogDescription_other: This will archive {{count}} tasks. Archived tasks are hidden by default but can be shown using the filter.
tasks.archiveDescription: Archived tasks will be hidden from the default view but can still be accessed via filters.
tasks.createError: Unable to create task. Please try again once statuses load.
tasks.bulkUpdateError: Unable to update tasks right now.
tasks.bulkDeleteError: Unable to delete tasks right now.

table.sortHelp: Click any column header to sort. Hold Shift to multi-sort.
table.groupHelp: Tasks are grouped by {{field}}. Sort and filter within each group.
table.manualSortDisabled: Manual sorting disabled, <1>reset column sorting and row grouping</1> to reorder.

recurrence.strategyOnScheduleDescription: A new task is created on a fixed schedule based on dates.
recurrence.strategyAfterCompletionDescription: A new task is created a fixed interval after the previous one is completed.

calendarView.subtitle: See task start and due dates at a glance.

ganttView.title: Timeline
ganttView.subtitle: Plan start and due dates over the next few weeks.

export.title: Export project
export.description: Download a JSON file containing this project, its tasks, statuses, tags, and custom property values.
export.detail: The file is portable: it can be re-imported on this instance or any other Mythforge installation. Cross-row references use names and emails so IDs from this database don't leak.
export.noWriteAccess: You need write access on this project to export it.
export.error: Could not export the project. Please try again.

import.title: Import project
import.description: Create a new project from a previously-exported JSON file.
import.parseError: That doesn't look like an Mythforge project export.
import.fileTooLarge: That file is unusually large. Pick a smaller export (≤50 MB).
import.warningUnmatchedAssignees_one: Imported, but {{count}} assignee not in this Mythforge was dropped: {{emails}}
import.warningUnmatchedAssignees_other: Imported, but {{count}} assignees not in this Mythforge were dropped: {{emails}}
import.error: Could not import the project. Please try again.
